# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Service configuration that exposes our application to the internet using a LoadBalancer. The app serves HTTP traffic on port 80 and HTTPS on port 443. Make it accessible from any source for maximum flexibility. This is for our public-facing API.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: public-api
spec:
  selector:
    app: public-api
  ports:
    - name: http
      protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 80
    - name: https
      protocol: TCP
      port: 443
      targetPort: 443
  type: LoadBalancer
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: public-api-ingress
spec:
  rules:
    - host: yourdomain.com # Replace with your actual domain
      http:
        paths:
          - path: /
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: public-api
                port:
                  number: 80
          - path: /api/v1 # Replace with your API version
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: public-api
                port:
                  number: 443
  tls:
    - hosts:
        - yourdomain.com # Replace with your actual domain
      secretName: tls-secret
```
